channel.title: Awesome Academic Research Skills
channel.description: 每日自动更新的学术论文与科研 Agent Skill 排行榜 · Daily ranking of academic research agent skills on GitHub

item.title: brycewang-stanford/Auto-Empirical-Research-Skills (3,021★, +88/7d)
item.description: 🔬 A curated collection of 23,000+ agent skills for empirical research across 8 social science disciplines. | 精选 23,000+ AI Agent 技能库，覆盖8大社会科学学科的实证研究。CoPaper.AI 20分钟完成一篇可复现的规范实证论文，并支持用户上传 Skills。-- Ma…

item.title: Yuan1z0825/nature-skills (30,559★, +1581/7d)
item.description: 符合nature论文学术表达和科研绘图的Skill

item.title: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills (39,069★, +1063/7d)
item.description: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

item.title: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills-codex (6,880★, +540/7d)
item.description: Codex-native Academic Research Skills suite for human-in-the-loop academic research workflows

item.title: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills (31,510★, +526/7d)
item.description: Turn any AI agent into an AI Scientist. The #1 Agent Skills library for science, used by 160,000+ scientists worldwide. 148 ready-to-use skills plus 100+ scientific databases covering biology, chemis…

item.title: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep (13,733★, +269/7d)
item.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works w…

item.title: Master-cai/Research-Paper-Writing-Skills (5,440★, +269/7d)
item.description: Skill package for ML/CV/NLP paper writing, curated and adapted from Prof. Peng Sida's open notes for Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini.

item.title: Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs (11,000★, +245/7d)
item.description: Comprehensive open-source library of AI research and engineering skills for any AI model. Package the skills and your claude code/codex/gemini agent will be an AI research agent with full horsepower.…

item.title: HKUSTDial/Supervisor-Skills (4,250★, +242/7d)
item.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。

item.title: WUBING2023/PaperSpine (4,292★, +222/7d)
item.description: PaperSpine is a motivation-driven skill for learning from strong academic papers, building a paper’s central argument, and rewriting manuscripts through evidence-aware blueprints, revision matrices,…
